evals.name: ambiguous-banking-ops-solution
evals.prompt: We have a vague banking operations problem: too many manual reviews and business wants to use AI. Brainstorm publication-grounded solution directions and draft a method plus evaluation plan.
evals.expected_behavior: Frames the problem, asks or states missing details, searches by problem shape, proposes 3-5 literature-grounded solution candidates, and includes baselines/evaluation rather than generic AI ideas.

evals.name: paper-backed-llm-proposal
evals.prompt: I need an internal R&D proposal for using LLMs to help relationship managers answer policy and product questions. It must be based on prior successful cases and publications if possible.
evals.expected_behavior: Grounds the proposal in retrieval, grounded generation, human evaluation, and enterprise assistant precedent; separates literature evidence from transfer assumptions; proposes a pilot and guardrails.
